TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cnrux_Cinqlangan_Sezirayrak_qa_linhuyan_spung_tqbaq_yaw_na_Genzyuminrok, title = Cnrux_Cinqlangan_Sezirayrak_qa_linhuyan_spung_tqbaq_yaw_na_Genzyuminrok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cnrux_Cinqlangan_Sezirayrak_qa_linhuyan_spung_tqbaq_yaw_na_Genzyuminrok} }

S.FORM: == Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok == linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok, linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Puqing ppgleng qa lhuyan qani ga snsiy Rinsyocer. Qutux seng qesux kbhul qesux pgal qesux kawas cinrxan nqu lhuyan qan calay lalu nya ga lhuyan spung tqbaqan na ke'an, gaga ki kyoyic qa Genzyumin, knrtung cinlalu hiya ga san ALCD, saying seng ru pitu kawas laga wayal tliqan pyanga pinbawiq na yaw qa Sezi rayrak cqani.

== Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok == linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok, linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Puqing ppgleng qa lhuyan qani ga snsiy Rinsyocer. Qutux seng qesux kbhul qesux pgal qesux kawas cinrxan nqu lhuyan qan calay lalu nya ga lhuyan spung tqbaqan na ke'an, gaga ki kyoyic qa Genzyumin, knrtung cinlalu hiya ga san ALCD, saying seng ru pitu kawas laga wayal tliqan pyanga pinbawiq na yaw qa Sezi rayrak cqani.
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®nrux ¶~ ®inqlaŇčan s~…ēezirajrak qa linńßujan s~…ēpuŇč tqő≤aq jaw na …£enzjuminrok == linńßujan qani …£a qaő≤ax s~…ēns~…ēij mwańß prraw niwan llwax na lńßujan, s~…ēqunun nańßa s~…ēns~…ēij mő≤inańß rajrak mwańß ms~…ēqun kő≤alaj linńßujan na rmurux jaw na s~…ēpuŇč tqő≤aq jaw na …£enzjuminrok. ¶~ ®nrux ¶~ ®inqlaŇčan s~…ēezirajrak qa linńßujan s~…ēpuŇč tqő≤aq jaw na …£enzjuminrok, linńßujan qani …£a qaő≤ax s~…ēns~…ēij mwańß prraw niwan llwax na lńßujan, s~…ēqunun nańßa s~…ēns~…ēij mő≤inańß rajrak mwańß ms~…ēqun kő≤alaj linńßujan na rmurux jaw na s~…ēpuŇč tqő≤aq jaw na …£enzjuminrok. puqiŇč pp…£leŇč qa lńßujan qani …£a s~…ēns~…ēij rins~…ējo ¶~ ®er. qutux s~…ēeŇč qes~…ēux kő≤ńßul qes~…ēux p…£al qes~…ēux kawas~…ē ¶~ ®inrxan nqu lńßujan qan ¶~ ®alaj lalu nja …£a lńßujan s~…ēpuŇč tqő≤aqan na ke Ēan, …£a…£a ki kjoji ¶~ ® qa …£enzjumin, knrtuŇč ¶~ ®inlalu ńßija …£a s~…ēan al ¶~ ®*, s~…ēajiŇč s~…ēeŇč ru pitu kawas~…ē la…£a wajal tliqan pjaŇča pinő≤awiq na jaw qa s~…ēezi rajrak ¶~ ®qani.
